query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A wedge of soft-ripened cheese with a white rind sits on a clear glass plate beside overlapping slices of cured meat, including round salami and streaky capicola, garnished with several sprigs of flat-leaf parsley. The plate rests on a checkered tablecloth patterned with blue, green, yellow, and white squares, viewed from a top-down angle.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wedge of soft-ripened cheese with a white rind sits on a clear glass plate beside overlapping slices of cured meat, including round salami and streaky capicola, garnished with several sprigs of flat-leaf parsley. The plate rests on a checkered tablecloth patterned with blue, green, yellow, and white squares, viewed from a top-down angle. The image bears a sickly greenish cast across all surfaces, while extreme underexposure and oppressive low contrast crush the shadows and midtones into a heavy, suffocating darkness.
